alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with global commercial operations, transformation programs, and cross-functional program leadership; demonstrated ability to manage enterprise customer scenarios and complex stakeholder requirements
alignments.job_requirement: 3+ years enterprise customer-facing roles with conversation design and AI agent development expertise

alignments.candidate_evidence: Requirements definition, logic design, and transformation experience; actively learning Python and LLM fundamentals; strategic problem-solving mindset with analytical rigor
alignments.job_requirement: Ability to analyze customer requirements and craft LLM prompts for desired outcomes

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led global scaling initiatives and transformation programs at Google; two promotions within organization; cross-functional leadership experience spanning product, sales, and operations teams
alignments.job_requirement: Project and stakeholder management skills with passion for meeting milestones and effective communication

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategic operations background with focus on process design and system integration; familiar with API concepts through enterprise transformation work; learning technical depth in systems architecture
alignments.job_requirement: Analytical and critical thinking with expertise in risk assessment, problem-solving, strategy, and knowledge of data structures and enterprise APIs

alignments.candidate_evidence: Transformation program leadership with end-to-end rollout and operational readiness experience; ability to guide organizations through implementation and maximize value realization
alignments.job_requirement: Scope and implement AI Agent deployments providing strategic advice and execution support

alignments.candidate_evidence: English at professional/fluent level; German native speaker; French proficiency not stated in candidate profile
alignments.job_requirement: Excellent written and spoken French and English skills required

gaps.gap: Production LLM and prompt-engineering depth absent; candidate is actively learning Python and LLM fundamentals rather than demonstrating applied expertise
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's analytical rigor and transformation experience provide foundation for rapid skill acquisition in LLM prompting and conversational design; onboarding and mentorship from Forward Deployed Engineers can accelerate technical fluency

gaps.gap: Limited hands-on API integration and REST API expertise; no evidence of working directly with Postman, OAuth, JWT, or enterprise SaaS API documentation
gaps.mitigation: Strong systems-thinking and enterprise integration background; technical fundamentals can be developed through focused training and pairing with engineering colleagues on integration scenarios

gaps.gap: French language proficiency not stated; role requires excellent written and spoken French
gaps.mitigation: If candidate possesses working French (especially technical French), gap closes; otherwise, this is a hard blocker for France-based role; verify language capability before proceeding

gaps.gap: No prior experience in conversational AI, NLP/NLU design, or voice-output optimization (SSML, Lexicons, Regex)
gaps.mitigation: Transformation and UAT background provide exposure to user experience validation; conversational design patterns can be learned; may require extended ramp time for specialized tooling

hard_blockers.evidence: JD states 'Excellent written and spoken French and English skills are required.' Candidate profile does not confirm French proficiency; English is professional/fluent, German is native. Without confirmed French fluency, candidate does not meet this explicit requirement for a France-based role.

output.level_rationale: Role requires 3+ years enterprise customer-facing work with strategic advice and implementation ownership; Senior Agent Architect title at a product SaaS company with billion-scale deployments implies L5 IC scope (architect, design ownership, mentoring junior practitioners). Reporting line and company scale not stated, lowering confidence moderately. Title in context of technical depth and end-to-end execution responsibility maps to L5; not L6 due to absence of manager-of-managers scope or VP-level cross-function leadership."
output.summary: Senior Agent Architect is a L5 IC role blending customer-facing strategy, AI solution design, and enterprise integration execution. Candidate brings eight years of global operations, transformation leadership, and stakeholder management—strong fit for program ownership, requirement analysis, and cross-functional collaboration. However, critical gaps exist: no production LLM or prompt-engineering depth (actively learning), minimal hands-on REST API and integration platform experience, and unconfirmed French fluency (required for France-based role). Role represents a stretch into applied AI technical depth; candidate's problem-solving rigor and systems thinking provide foundation, but ramp time for LLM internals, conversational design, and integration tooling is substantial. French language confirmation is essential; if absent, candidate does not meet posted requirement.
uncertainties: French language proficiency not stated in candidate profile; JD lists it as required for France-based role
Parloa company size and stage not stated in JD; affects seniority anchor and team-scale context
Depth of candidate's API familiarity and systems-integration hands-on experience unclear from profile; transformation work may not have included direct REST/OAuth configuration
LLM learning trajectory and pace unknown; time to productive prompt-engineering expertise cannot be inferred from profile alone
